name: Staff of Flowing Water

passives.name: Rapids
passives.effects: {{tip|Heal|Healing}} or {{tip|shield|shielding}} allied champions (''excluding yourself'') grants you and them {{as|45 ability power}} for 6 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Healing or shielding an allied champion (excluding yourself) grants you and them 45 ability power for 6 seconds.

simpleDescription: Your heals and shields reduce crowd control and grant Move Speed

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Rapids execution model against page-level source: buff applies to both caster and healed/shielded ally champion; self-only healing/shielding does not trigger Rapids.
